top3.sql:
SELECT SUM(e.cost) 
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff';

SELECT SUM(e.cost) AS total_expense
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff';

SELECT SUM(e.cost) 
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff';

SELECT SUM(e.cost) AS total_expense
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff';

SELECT SUM(e.cost) AS total_expense
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
GROUP BY ev.event_id;

SELECT SUM(e.cost) 
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff';

SELECT SUM(e.cost) AS total_expense
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff';

SELECT SUM(e.cost) AS total_expense
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
GROUP BY ev.event_id;

final.sql:
SELECT SUM(e.cost) 
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff';
